rag_definition: RAG retrieves external passages and conditions the generator on that evidence before answering.
hybrid_retrieval: Hybrid retrieval combines lexical ranking and dense vector search to improve retrieval quality, often followed by reranking for precision.
citation_support: Citation support checks whether each answer claim is grounded in the cited passage.
attention_not_citation: No. Attention weights do not prove that a generated claim is supported by an external source.
vector_tuning: Index choice, chunk size, embedding model, and metadata filters can change retrieval recall and latency.
